added_text./app/create_samples.py:
import numpy as np

# Generate normal samples
np.random.seed(42)
normal_samples = np.random.normal(0, 1, 1000)
np.savetxt("/app/normal_samples.txt", normal_samples)
print(f"Normal samples: mean={normal_samples.mean():.4f}, std={normal_samples.std():.4f}")

# Generate exponential samples
np.random.seed(42)
exp_samples = np.random.exponential(1, 1000)
np.savetxt("/app/exponential_samples.txt", exp_samples)
print(f"Exponential samples: mean={exp_samples.mean():.4f}")
